title: Guided Odysseys: Narrative Learning Paths
overview: Expert-curated journeys through the history of programming, designed to show the logical evolution of paradigms and systems.
historical_context: Created for the Language Atlas to solve the problem of fragmented, non-linear learning in programming history.
mental_model: A curated museum tour where each room (language) builds on the previous one, leading to a modern destination.
tradeoffs: Human-curated paths are limited in number but offer higher narrative quality than automated ones.
legacy: The core educational framework of the Language Atlas.
ai_assisted_discovery_missions: Analyze how the "Systems Renaissance" Odyssey uses challenges to teach memory safety.
Design a new Odyssey for the "Web Explosion" era.
